stemHtml: The declared distances, which shall be calculated for each runway direction, are the take-off run available (TORA)…

options.a: take-off distance available (TODA), and runway length (RL).
options.b: accelerate-stop distance available (ASDA), landing distance available (LDA), and, if present, length of any displaced thresholds (THR).
options.c: take-off distance available (TODA), accelerate-stop distance available (ASDA), and runway-end safety area (RESA).
options.d: take-off distance available (TODA), accelerate-stop distance available (ASDA), and landing distance available (LDA).
